---
title: "Doctor Visit Data"
author: "Cameron & Trivedi"
date: "2002-01-01"
categories: [Bootstrap-Simulation]
---

## Source

This is Doctor visit data from Cameron & Trivedi Microeconometrics Using Stata, Second Edition 
using data from the 2002 Medical Expenditure Panel Survey age 24-65, private sector not self-employed, excludes public insurance Medicare/Medicaid

## Dataset

[mus10data.dta](../../data/mus10data.dta)

or use directly in code
```
use https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tphofer/ncsp-hhcr/refs/heads/main/data/mus10data.dta
```

## Dataset description 

### Features

count, healthcare utilization, longitudinal

### Variables

```text
Contains data from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tphofer/ncsp-hhcr/refs/heads/main/data/mus10data.dta
 Observations:        30,124                  
    Variables:            28                  28 Feb 2007 16:04
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Variable      Storage   Display    Value
    name         type    format    label      Variable label
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
educ            byte    %8.0g                 Years of schooling
docvis          int     %8.0g                 number of doctor visits
age             float   %9.0g                 Age in years / 10
income          float   %9.0g                 Income in $ / 1000
female          byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if female
black           byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if black
hispanic        byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if hispanic
married         byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if married
noreast         byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if Northeast
midwest         byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if Midwest
south           byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if South
msa             byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if metropolitan statistical area
firmsize        float   %9.0g                 Size of firm/100
vegood          byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if very good health
good            byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if good health
physlim         byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if physical limitation
fairpoor        byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if fair or poor health
age2            float   %9.0g                 = age x age
year97          byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if year 1997
year98          byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if year 1998
year99          byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if year 1999
year00          byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if year 2000
year01          byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if year 2001
year02          byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if year 2003
famsize         byte    %8.0g                 Family size
injury          byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if an injury
private         byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if private insurance
chronic         byte    %8.0g                 = 1 if a chronic condition
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sorted by: 
```
